---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a capability with clear architectural justification
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

> **Notice:** We value engineering quality over quantity. Proposals must demonstrate a concrete problem and a justified design before implementation begins.

## Problem Statement

Describe the limitation or gap in current behavior. Reference affected use cases, workflow patterns, or integration scenarios.

## Proposed Solution

Define the proposed capability in technical terms: API surface, data model changes, runtime behavior, and expected outcomes.

## Architectural Impact

Assess effects on existing components, contracts, versioning, concurrency guarantees, and backward compatibility.

| Area | Impact |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Core Runtime** | None / Low / Medium / High |
| **Public API / Contracts** | None / Low / Medium / High |
| **Database Schema** | None / Low / Medium / High |
| **Breaking Changes** | Yes / No |

Provide rationale for each non-trivial impact.

## Alternatives Considered

List alternative approaches and explain why they were rejected or deferred.

## Testing Strategy

Describe how the feature will be verified: unit tests, integration tests, concurrency scenarios, and regression coverage.
